description_long: This object is a slender, elegant vase with a bulbous base and a narrow neck, holding a bouquet of white flowers with yellow centers. The vase appears to be made of smooth, glossy ceramic, giving it a refined and polished look. The flowers have broad, rounded petals and are arranged in a way that they fan out from the top of the vase, creating a full and balanced display. The stems of the flowers are green and partially visible, adding a touch of natural color contrast. The overall composition is simple yet sophisticated, suitable for decorative purposes in both modern and classic urban interiors. There are no visible decorative patterns or labels on the vase, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic.
description: A tall, glossy ceramic vase holds a bouquet of white flowers with yellow centers, arranged in a clean and minimalist style.
description_view_0: The vase is seen with three prominent white flowers facing forward, showing the yellow centers and a slight view of the green stems.
description_view_1: This view highlights the wide spread of the flower petals, with the bouquet appearing fuller and more symmetrical.
description_view_2: The vase's neck and base are clearly visible, with the flowers slightly angled, revealing more of the green stems inside.
description_view_3: The arrangement appears balanced, with the flowers fanning out and the vase's smooth, glossy surface reflecting light.
